calendar.matters:
Osc Re: Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Sep-28-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Ginetta Giovinco, Esq. of RWG Law 213-626-8484 for Petitioner John Danhakl.
Michael Einhorn, Deputy Attorney and Stacy Lau, Deputy Attorney 510-433-9100 of CALTRANS for Respondent California Coastal Commission.
Nicholas Tsukamaki, Deputy Attorney General 510-879-0982 of the Office of the Attorney General for Respondent California Coastal Commission.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court shares it's views. Both sides argue lack of jurisdiction, project conflict.(as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Order to Show Cause re: Preliminary Injunction.

Taken Under Submission.**

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

**After the hearing, the Court signs an Order Denying Application for Preliminary Injunction. (see scanned order for details).**
